rep_year.default: select extract(year from sysdate)+543 from dual where 1=1

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , vr_tel_loan_by_day.* , (day1 + day2 + day3 + day4 + day5 + day6 + day7 + day8 + day9 + day10 + day11 + day12 + day13 + day14 + day15 + day16 + day17 + day18 + day19 + day20 + day21 + day22 + day23 + day24 + day25 + day26 + day27 + day28 + day29 + day30 + coalesce(day31,0)) as count_con , (select month_name_thai from sc_cnt_m_month where month_no = vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_month) as rep_month_thai from vr_tel_loan_by_day , sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and vr_tel_loan_by_day.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and vr_tel_loan_by_day.total_loan > 0 /*WHERE*/ --and vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_year = '2567' --and vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_month = '4' order by vr_tel_loan_by_day.loan_type

r_port_loan_paid_sum_by_month_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , vr_tel_loan_by_day.loan_type , vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_year , vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_month , vr_tel_loan_by_day.total_loan , vr_tel_loan_by_day.total_contract , vr_tel_loan_by_day.total_paid , vr_tel_loan_by_day.dr_amount , vr_tel_loan_by_day.cr_amount , vr_tel_loan_by_day.dr_amount + vr_tel_loan_by_day.cr_amount as sum_amount , (day1 + day2 + day3 + day4 + day5 + day6 + day7 + day8 + day9 + day10 + day11 + day12 + day13 + day14 + day15 + day16 + day17 + day18 + day19 + day20 + day21 + day22 + day23 + day24 + day25 + day26 + day27 + day28 + day29 + day30 + coalesce(day31,0)) as count_con from vr_tel_loan_by_day , sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and vr_tel_loan_by_day.loan_type = sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type and vr_tel_loan_by_day.total_loan > 0 and vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_year = {0} and vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_month = {1} /*WHERE*/ --and vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_year = '2567' --and vr_tel_loan_by_day.rep_month = '4' order by vr_tel_loan_by_day.loan_type
